home.name: J. Francisco Robles
home.description1: Software professional with over 4 years of experience specialized in architecture and development of scalable web applications.
home.description2: I work with both technical teams in corporate environments and business owners who need effective digital solutions.
home.forRecruitersDesc: If you're looking for a senior software architect with proven experience in complex systems, scalable APIs, and modern application architecture.
home.forBusinessDesc: If you need a website that attracts customers, an online store, or to improve your digital presence without technical complications.

engineering.title: Software Architect | Full-Stack Engineer
engineering.subtitle: Specialized in scalable architecture design, full-stack development with JavaScript/TypeScript, and technical leadership of complex projects.
engineering.profileDesc: Software Architect with over 4 years of experience in designing and implementing highly complex enterprise systems.
engineering.expertise1: Software architecture and distributed systems design
engineering.expertise2: Full-stack development with modern JavaScript/TypeScript stack
engineering.expertise3: Implementation of advanced search systems (Elasticsearch, MeiliSearch)
engineering.expertise4: REST and GraphQL API design and integration
engineering.companyDesc: Company specialized in luxury real estate. Responsible for architectural design, development, and maintenance of the entire company's technological infrastructure.
engineering.project1Desc: Multi-tenant platform for Mexican law firms. I designed the data model, the AI modules (Sof.ia, Contract Builder) and the integration with the Mexican judiciary for deadline alerts.
engineering.project1Stack: Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Prisma, LLMs, Vercel
engineering.project1Result: Result: 8+ modules live, 4 plans (Free → Pro), 100% multi-tenant
engineering.project2Desc: Monorepo with NestJS API, Next.js web app and React Native mobile app for 40+ agents. Migrated 90K contacts and 12K properties from Salesforce, with 100+ granular RBAC permissions and an internal Drive on Cloudflare R2.
engineering.project2Stack: Stack: NestJS, Next.js, React Native, Prisma, PostgreSQL, R2, WebSockets
engineering.project2Result: Result: 18+ integrated modules replacing Salesforce licenses since 2025
engineering.project3Desc: SEO-first portal with self-hosted Meilisearch, per-listing static generation and Payload CMS so the team can edit content without touching code. Replaced reliance on generic real estate portals.
engineering.project3Stack: Stack: Next.js, Payload CMS, Meilisearch, InstantSearch.js, Vercel
engineering.project3Result: Result: 300+ indexed listings, 40+ agents on platform, green Core Web Vitals
engineering.skill5: CI/CD with Docker and automated pipelines
engineering.stackDailyDesc: What I touch every week in production
engineering.stackDailyTech: TypeScript, Next.js, NestJS, React, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Tailwind, Vercel
engineering.stackFrequentTech: React Native, Astro, Meilisearch, Payload CMS, Cloudflare R2, WebSockets, LLMs (OpenAI/Anthropic)
engineering.stackKnownDesc: Shipped to production, not my focus today
engineering.stackKnownTech: Express, GraphQL, MongoDB, Elasticsearch, Docker, Railway, Electron, Framer Motion
engineering.achievement1: Migrated 90,000+ contacts and 12,000+ properties from Salesforce to an in-house CRM, zero downtime
engineering.achievement2: Designed multi-tenant architecture for Zeitap: 8+ modules in production across 4 commercial plans
engineering.achievement3: Built a monorepo with 3 apps (NestJS API, Next.js web, React Native mobile) sharing a typed SDK
engineering.achievement4: Implemented granular RBAC with 100+ permissions per resource × action, synced by seeder on every deploy
engineering.achievement5: Cut search latency by 80% migrating to self-hosted Meilisearch (sub-50ms queries at a flat cost)
engineering.achievement6: Embedded AI assistants (LLMs) into real legal workflows: guided contracts, case-law analysis, DOF alerts
engineering.cleanCodeDesc: I write code thinking about scalability and ease of maintenance. I prioritize readability and clear documentation.
engineering.architectureDesc: I evaluate trade-offs, consider future scalability, and select technologies based on actual project requirements.
engineering.learningDesc: I maintain constant updates with new technologies, patterns, and industry best practices.
engineering.collaborationDesc: Experience working with multidisciplinary teams and communicating technical decisions to non-technical stakeholders.

business.title: Web Solutions to Grow Your Business
business.subtitle: Your business needs a digital presence that works. I create websites and online stores that attract customers, generate sales, and save you time.
business.heroPriceTag: Projects from $800 USD — Delivery in 2 to 4 weeks
business.problem1: Your business doesn't show up when people search on Google
business.problem2: You have social media but no place of your own to showcase your products
business.problem3: You lose customers because they have no easy way to contact you or buy
business.problem4: Your competition already has a website and you don't
business.problem5: You tried building one yourself and it ended up abandoned
business.goodNewsDesc: You don't need to be a tech expert. I handle all the technical process while you focus on your business.
business.services: What I Can Do for Your Business
business.service4Title: Integration with Tools You Already Use
business.process: How We Work Together (3 Simple Steps)
business.step1Note: No commitment. Just to understand if I can help you.
business.step2Note: You decide if we move forward.
business.faq1Q: How much does a website cost?
business.faq1A: It depends on what you need. A basic site can start from $800 USD. An online store has a different price. In the initial call I'll give you a clear estimate.
business.faq2A: A simple website: 2-3 weeks. An online store: 3-4 weeks. I'll give you specific dates in the proposal.
business.faq3Q: Do I need to know about technology?
business.faq3A: No. I handle all the technical stuff. You just provide your business information.
business.faq4Q: Can I make changes myself later?
business.faq4A: Yes. I'll teach you how to update basic content (texts, photos, products). For major changes, you can contact me.
business.faq5Q: Does it include domain and hosting?
business.faq5A: I'll help you hire and configure the domain (.com, .mx, etc.) and hosting. The cost of these services is separate (generally $15-40 USD per year).
business.faq6Q: What if I have problems later?
business.faq6A: I include 1 month of free support after delivery. After that I offer monthly maintenance packages.
business.caseStudyBefore: Before: An old, slow WordPress site that was painful to maintain
business.caseStudyAfter: After: Professional portal with 500+ listings, advanced search and a dashboard so the team updates content without touching code
business.caseStudyResult: Result: Up to 5× faster site rebuilt on Next.js, green Core Web Vitals and better Google indexing
business.ctaTitle: Schedule a 30-minute call with no commitment
business.ctaDesc: Let's talk about your business and see how a website can help you grow.
business.finalNoteDesc: I work directly and personally. I'm not an agency with 20 people. It's me, Francisco, who designs, programs, and delivers your project.
business.problems1: Your business doesn't appear when people search on Google
business.problems2: You have social media but no place of your own to showcase your products
business.problems3: You lose customers because they have no easy way to contact you or buy
business.problems4: Your competition already has a website and you don't
business.problems5: You tried making a site yourself and it was abandoned
business.service1Feature1: Modern website that represents your brand well
business.service1Feature2: Adapted to look perfect on mobile, tablet, and computer
business.service1Feature3: Optimized for Google to find it easily
business.service1Feature4: Contact form directly to your WhatsApp or email
business.service2Feature1: Product catalog with photos, prices, and descriptions
business.service2Feature3: Direct WhatsApp connection to close sales
business.service2Feature5: Easy updates (you can add products yourself)
business.service2Ideal3: Businesses selling through social media wanting to professionalize
business.service3Feature1: Page focused on one thing: getting the customer to take action
business.service3Feature2: Persuasive design that converts visitors into customers
business.service3Feature4: Compatible with Facebook and Instagram ads
business.service3Ideal1: Launch of new product or service
business.service4Feature1: Connect your site with WhatsApp Business
business.service4Feature3: Forms that go directly to your email
business.service4Feature4: Connection with payment tools (Stripe, PayPal, etc.)
business.step21: Description of what I'm going to create
business.step22: How much it costs (fixed price, no surprises)
business.step3IHandle4: Teaching you how to make basic changes
business.benefits1: More customers: People find you on Google and learn about your services 24/7
business.benefits2: Save time: Stop answering the same thing a thousand times on WhatsApp
business.benefits3: Professionalism: You look serious and trustworthy compared to your competition
business.benefits4: Total control: It's YOUR site, you don't depend on social media that change rules
business.benefits5: Investment that works: Your site sells while you sleep

about.title: About Me
about.intro1: I'm Francisco, a software architect with over 4 years of experience specialized in the JavaScript ecosystem. My passion is transforming complex ideas into elegant and functional web solutions.
about.intro2: I started my career in web development exploring different technologies until I found my specialization in React, Next.js, and Node.js. Throughout these years, I've had the opportunity to work on challenging projects that have allowed me to grow both technically and professionally.
about.intro3: I currently work at Probien Bienes Exclusivos, where I develop custom CRM systems and e-commerce platforms for the real estate sector. My work includes everything from designing scalable architectures to implementing complex search functionalities with Meilisearch and Elasticsearch.
about.intro4: What I enjoy most about development is the problem-solving process: understanding requirements, designing the most efficient solution, and writing clean code that other developers can easily maintain. I firmly believe that code should be both functional and readable.
about.frontendDesc: I create modern and responsive user interfaces with React, Next.js, and Astro, prioritizing user experience and performance.
about.backendDesc: I design and implement scalable REST APIs with Node.js and Express, integrating databases like PostgreSQL and Supabase.
about.searchDesc: I implement advanced search solutions with Meilisearch and Elasticsearch to enhance user experience.
about.architectureDesc: I design scalable and maintainable architectures, making technical decisions that ensure long-term project success.
about.cleanCodeDesc: I write code thinking about the next developer who will read it, even if that developer is myself in 6 months.
about.learningDesc: Technology evolves rapidly. I stay updated with the latest trends and best practices in web development.
about.userFirstDesc: Every technical decision is made with the goal of creating the best possible experience for the end user.
about.performanceDesc: I optimize every application to be fast and efficient, because users value their time.
about.letsTalkDesc: I'm always open to new interesting projects and collaboration opportunities. If you have an idea or project in mind, I'd love to hear from you.

work.title: My Professional Journey
work.description: Company specialized in luxury real estate
work.project1Desc: Designed and developed from scratch a complete property catalog platform with advanced search system, dynamic filters, and multiple categories.
work.project2Desc: Created a comprehensive client and property management system specifically tailored to the real estate sector's needs, with lead management and sales tracking.
work.project3Desc: Implemented and optimized a search engine that significantly improved user experience when searching for properties with complex criteria.

probienCatalog.title: Probien Catalog - Public Portal
probienCatalog.description: Web platform to showcase properties and real estate agents with over 500 static pages, SEO optimization, and responsive design.
features: Real estate website with optimized design and functionality.
Advanced elastic search for enhanced user experience.
Implemented with Headless CMS to streamline development.

probienCRM.title: Probien CRM
probienCRM.description: Internal system for end-to-end real estate operations with 18+ modules. Complete UI redesign and new mobile view built for fieldwork.
features: Redesigned interface focused on the sales team's day-to-day productivity.
Dedicated mobile view so agents can browse properties and leads on the go.
18+ modules: CRM, properties, leads, sales, inventory and reporting.
Scalable, secure architecture built on modern technologies.

zeitap.title: Zeitap
zeitap.description: SaaS legal software built for Mexican law firms. Centralizes case, client and document management with built-in AI.
features: Legal Tracker with structured case follow-up and real-time status.
Automated alerts wired into the Mexican judiciary to monitor deadlines.
Client portal so clients can check progress, documents and updates without back-and-forth.
Embedded AI assistants for repetitive legal tasks.

webpwizard.title: WebPWizard
webpwizard.description: Browser-only WebP image converter. No uploads, no signup, no waiting.
features: Fully client-side processing — your images never leave the browser.
Batch conversion with quality control and live preview.
Supports JPG, PNG and other formats with one-click download.

bloom.title: Bloom
bloom.description: Desktop app for personal productivity and finance: kanban, gantt and multi-currency accounts in a single tool.
features: Kanban boards and Gantt timeline with drag-and-drop and task dependencies.
Multi-currency accounts with categorization and visual reporting.
Ten pastel themes per board, fully offline with local SQLite storage.

portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio
portfolio.description: My multilingual personal portfolio website with support for Spanish and English.
features: Multilingual website with complete internationalization.
Translated routes and smooth navigation between languages.
Responsive design and SEO optimized.
